seo.title: Start Audit | Website Reality Check | Vantus Systems
seo.meta_description: Request a Website Reality Check from Vantus Systems. Tell us what is broken, what is unclear, and what your business needs next.

hero.headline: Start your Website Reality Check
hero.subheadline: This is the fastest way to get a serious read on what is hurting trust, where the real technical or workflow debt sits, and which offer is actually appropriate.

sections.heading: What happens next
sections.body: You submit the form. Vantus reviews the current situation, the main pain points, and the likely scope fit. If the opportunity is a fit, the next step is a focused call and, when appropriate, a Discovery + Solution Blueprint.

sections.heading: Tell us what is wrong, what is urgent, and what you are trying to fix
sections.body: Good inputs make the review better. If the main issue is credibility, say that. If the problem is content control, say that. If the real issue is workflow sprawl, say that too. The point is to identify the right scope, not force every business into the same package.

sections.heading: What this is not
sections.body: This is not a bait-and-switch quote form. It is a qualification step designed to reduce wasted time, clarify fit, and point the project toward the right package.

sections.heading: Most audits turn into one of three paths
sections.body: If none of those fit, Vantus will say so. That is better than forcing a bad project into a familiar box.

sections.assurance_line: We review for fit, scope, and urgency before recommending next steps.
